sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּף

Transliteration: sûph

Phonetic: soof

BDB Definition:

  1. reed, rush, water plant
    1. rushes
    2. sea of rushes
      1. of Red Sea
      2. of arms of Red Sea
      3. of Gulf of Suez
      4. of sea from straits to Gulf of Akaba

Origin: probably of Egyptian origin

TWOT entry: 1479

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
